# zzobj2fig

## Overview

**zzobj2fig** is an R package for creating LaTeX tables from data frames
and statistical objects, generating cropped PDF outputs suitable for
direct inclusion in publications. The package provides journal-specific
themes (APA, Nature, NEJM), S3 methods for common statistical objects,
and R Markdown integration.

## Installation

### From GitHub

``` r

# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("rgt47/zzobj2fig")
```

### From Local Source

If you have cloned the repository locally:

``` r

# Using pak (preferred)
pak::local_install()

# Or using devtools
devtools::install()
```

From the command line:

``` bash
R CMD INSTALL .
```

### System Requirements

- R \>= 4.0
- LaTeX distribution (TeX Live, MiKTeX, TinyTeX, or MacTeX)
- `pdflatex` and `pdfcrop` executables
- Optional: ImageMagick (for PNG output), pdf2svg (for SVG output)

Check your setup:

``` r

library(zzobj2fig)
check_latex_deps()
```

## Quick Start

``` r

library(zzobj2fig)

# Basic usage: data frame to cropped PDF
o2f(mtcars[1:6, 1:4], filename = "my_table")

# With journal theme
o2f(mtcars[1:6, 1:4], theme = "nejm", filename = "nejm_table")

# Statistical objects (lm, glm, anova, etc.)
model <- lm(mpg ~ cyl + hp + wt, data = mtcars)
o2f(model, filename = "regression_table")

# Model comparison
m1 <- lm(mpg ~ cyl, data = mtcars)
m2 <- lm(mpg ~ cyl + hp, data = mtcars)
o2f_regression(Model1 = m1, Model2 = m2, stars = TRUE)
```

Output files generated:

- `my_table.tex` - LaTeX source
- `my_table.pdf` - Full PDF
- `my_table_cropped.pdf` - Cropped PDF for document inclusion

## Key Features

### Journal Themes

Built-in themes for common publication styles:

``` r

o2f(data, theme = "nejm")     # New England Journal of Medicine
o2f(data, theme = "apa")      # American Psychological Association
o2f(data, theme = "nature")   # Nature journals
o2f(data, theme = "minimal")  # Clean, minimal style

# Set global theme
o2f_theme_set("nejm")
```

### Statistical Object Support

Direct conversion of statistical objects to formatted tables:

| Object Type | Method |
|:---|:---|
| `data.frame` | [`o2f.data.frame()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.default.md) |
| `matrix` | [`o2f.matrix()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.matrix.md) |
| `lm` | [`o2f.lm()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.lm.md) |
| `glm` | [`o2f.glm()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.glm.md) |
| `anova` / `aov` | [`o2f.anova()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.anova.md) / [`o2f.aov()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.anova.md) |
| `htest` | [`o2f.htest()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.htest.md) |

**RMS package support** (biostatistics/clinical trials):

| Object Type | Method | Description |
|:---|:---|:---|
| `ols` | [`o2f.ols()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.ols.md) | Ordinary least squares |
| `lrm` | [`o2f.lrm()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.lrm.md) | Logistic regression (OR support) |
| `cph` | [`o2f.cph()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.cph.md) | Cox proportional hazards (HR support) |
| `orm` | [`o2f.orm()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.orm.md) | Ordinal regression |
| `Glm` | `o2f.Glm()` | Generalized linear models |
| `psm` | [`o2f.psm()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.psm.md) | Parametric survival models |

Additional types via broom integration: `coxph`, `survreg`, `nls`,
`polr`, `prcomp`, `kmeans`, `lmerMod`, `glmerMod`, `lme`, `Arima`.

**Any broom-supported object** works via
[`o2f_tidy()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_tidy.md):

``` r

o2f_tidy(any_broom_object, filename = "result")
```

### R Markdown Integration

Inline tables without LaTeX float positioning issues:

``` r

# In R Markdown
o2f_inline(model, width = "3in", caption = "Model Results")

# Quick coefficient table
o2f_coef(model, caption = "Coefficients")
```

### Decimal Alignment

Use siunitx for decimal-aligned numeric columns:

``` r

o2f(df, align = list("l", o2f_siunitx(table_format = "3.3")))
```

### Multi-Page Tables

For large tables spanning multiple pages:

``` r

o2f(large_data, longtable = TRUE, caption = "Complete Dataset")
```

## Function Reference

| Function | Purpose |
|:---|:---|
| [`o2f()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.md) | Convert object to PDF table |
| [`o2f_inline()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_inline.md) | Inline tables for R Markdown |
| [`o2f_coef()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_coef.md) | Quick coefficient tables |
| [`o2f_regression()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_regression.md) | Compare regression models |
| [`o2f_rms_compare()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_rms_compare.md) | Compare rms models |
| [`o2f_tidy()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_tidy.md) | Any broom-supported object |
| [`o2f_theme_set()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_theme_set.md) | Set global theme |
| [`o2f_theme_get()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_theme_get.md) | Get current theme |
| [`check_latex_deps()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/check_latex_deps.md) | Check LaTeX dependencies |
| [`ensure_pdfcrop()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/ensure_pdfcrop.md) | Install pdfcrop via TinyTeX |

## Key Parameters

| Parameter     | Description                | Default     |
|:--------------|:---------------------------|:------------|
| `caption`     | LaTeX table caption        | NULL        |
| `label`       | LaTeX label for cross-refs | NULL        |
| `align`       | Column alignment (l/c/r)   | NULL (auto) |
| `longtable`   | Multi-page table support   | FALSE       |
| `crop`        | Crop PDF margins           | TRUE        |
| `crop_margin` | Margin size (pts)          | 10          |
| `theme`       | Theme name or object       | NULL        |

## Why zzobj2fig vs. flextable?

Both packages export tables as standalone PDF files, but serve different
use cases:

### Choose zzobj2fig when you want:

- **LaTeX-native approach**: Creates actual LaTeX code using `pdflatex`
  and `pdfcrop` for professional LaTeX typography
- **Minimal interface**: Single function
  [`o2f()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.md) with
  minimal parameters
- **LaTeX ecosystem integration**: Generated `.tex` files can be
  manually edited and work within existing LaTeX workflows
- **kableExtra styling**: Uses familiar kableExtra formatting
- **Focused scope**: Minimal dependencies focused on one specific task

### Choose flextable when you want:

- **Multi-format output**: Tables for Word, PowerPoint, HTML, and PDF
- **Mixed content**: Combine text and images within table cells
- **Extensive formatting**: More styling options and conditional
  formatting
- **R graphics system**: Uses R’s native graphics system rather than
  external LaTeX tools

## Documentation

- [`vignette("quickstart")`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/articles/quickstart.md) -
  Quick start guide
- [`vignette("object-types-and-themes")`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/articles/object-types-and-themes.md) -
  Supported objects and themes
- [`vignette("advanced-features")`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/articles/advanced-features.md) -
  Advanced customization

## Development with Docker

This package uses Docker for reproducible development. All LaTeX
dependencies and R packages are pre-configured in the container.

### Prerequisites

- Docker Desktop (or Docker Engine on Linux)
- GNU Make

### Building the Docker Image

Build the image from the project root:

``` bash
# Standard build
make docker-build

# Rebuild without cache (force fresh build)
make docker-rebuild

# Build with verbose output (for debugging)
make docker-build-log
```

### Development Workflow

Start an interactive R session inside the container:

``` bash
make r
```

This command:

1.  Validates package dependencies before starting
2.  Launches a bash terminal with R, vim, and all tools available
3.  Mounts the project directory at `/home/rstudio/project`
4.  Validates dependencies again on exit (captures new packages)

For RStudio Server instead of terminal:

``` bash
make rstudio
```

Then open <http://localhost:8787> (username: `rstudio`, password:
`rstudio`).

### Running Package Tasks in Docker

``` bash
# Run tests
make docker-test

# Build vignettes
make docker-vignettes

# Full R CMD check
make docker-check

# Generate documentation
make docker-document
```

### Installing New Packages

Inside the container:

``` r

renv::install("newpackage")
```

On exit, `make r` automatically runs validation to update `renv.lock`.

### Available Make Targets

Run `make help` to see all available targets:

    Main workflow:
      r                     - Start bash terminal (vim editing)
      rstudio               - Start RStudio Server on http://localhost:8787

    Docker utilities:
      docker-build          - Build image from current renv.lock
      docker-rebuild        - Rebuild image without cache
      docker-test           - Run tests in container
      docker-check          - Full R CMD check in container
      docker-vignettes      - Build vignettes in container

    Cleanup:
      docker-clean          - Remove Docker image
      docker-prune-cache    - Remove Docker build cache

## License

GPL (\>= 3)

## Author

RG Thomas (<rgthomas@ucsd.edu>)

# Package index

## All functions

- [`advanced-features`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/advanced-features.md)
  : Advanced Table Features for zzobj2fig

- [`babel()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/babel.md) :
  Create a babel package specification for language support

- [`batch`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/batch.md) :
  Batch Processing API

- [`broom-methods`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/broom-methods.md)
  : Broom-Based S3 Methods for Extended Object Support

- [`caching`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/caching.md) :
  Caching Layer for o2f

- [`check_latex_deps()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/check_latex_deps.md)
  : Check LaTeX dependencies for zzobj2fig

- [`check_typst_deps()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/check_typst_deps.md)
  : Check Typst dependencies for zzo2f

- [`compile_latex()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/compile_latex.md)
  : Compile a LaTeX file to PDF

- [`convert_pdf_to_png()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/convert_pdf_to_png.md)
  : Convert PDF to PNG

- [`convert_pdf_to_svg()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/convert_pdf_to_svg.md)
  : Convert PDF to SVG

- [`create_latex_template()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/create_latex_template.md)
  : Create LaTeX document template with specified packages

- [`crop_pdf()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/crop_pdf.md)
  : Crop a PDF file

- [`ensure_pdfcrop()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/ensure_pdfcrop.md)
  : Ensure pdfcrop is available

- [`ensure_pdflatex()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/ensure_pdflatex.md)
  : Ensure pdflatex is available

- [`fontspec()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/fontspec.md)
  : Create fontspec package specification for custom fonts

- [`formatting`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/formatting.md)
  : Cell-Level Formatting Utilities

- [`geometry()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/geometry.md)
  : Create a geometry package specification

- [`knitr-engine`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/knitr-engine.md)
  : knitr Engine Integration

- [`latex-include`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/latex-include.md)
  : LaTeX Figure Inclusion Helpers

- [`o2f(`*`<Arima>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.Arima.md)
  : o2f method for ARIMA models

- [`o2f()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.md) :
  Convert objects to LaTeX tables

- [`o2f(`*`<anova>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.anova.md)
  [`o2f(`*`<aov>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.anova.md)
  : o2f method for ANOVA objects

- [`o2f(`*`<coxph>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.coxph.md)
  : o2f method for Cox proportional hazards models

- [`o2f(`*`<cph>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.cph.md)
  : o2f method for rms Cox proportional hazards models

- [`o2f(`*`<default>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.default.md)
  [`o2f(`*`<data.frame>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.default.md)
  : Default method for o2f (data frames)

- [`o2f(`*`<glm>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.glm.md)
  : o2f method for generalized linear models

- [`o2f(`*`<glmerMod>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.glmerMod.md)
  : o2f method for lme4 generalized linear mixed models

- [`o2f(`*`<htest>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.htest.md)
  : o2f method for hypothesis tests

- [`o2f(`*`<kmeans>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.kmeans.md)
  : o2f method for k-means clustering

- [`o2f(`*`<lm>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.lm.md)
  : o2f method for linear models

- [`o2f(`*`<lme>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.lme.md)
  : o2f method for nlme linear mixed models

- [`o2f(`*`<lmerMod>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.lmerMod.md)
  : o2f method for lme4 linear mixed models

- [`o2f(`*`<lrm>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.lrm.md)
  : o2f method for rms logistic regression models

- [`o2f(`*`<matrix>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.matrix.md)
  : o2f method for matrix

- [`o2f(`*`<multinom>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.multinom.md)
  : o2f method for multinomial logistic regression

- [`o2f(`*`<nls>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.nls.md)
  : o2f method for nonlinear least squares models

- [`o2f(`*`<ols>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.ols.md)
  : o2f method for rms ordinary least squares models

- [`o2f(`*`<orm>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.orm.md)
  : o2f method for rms ordinal regression models

- [`o2f(`*`<polr>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.polr.md)
  : o2f method for ordinal logistic regression (polr)

- [`o2f(`*`<prcomp>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.prcomp.md)
  : o2f method for principal component analysis

- [`o2f(`*`<psm>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.psm.md)
  : o2f method for rms parametric survival models

- [`o2f(`*`<survdiff>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.survdiff.md)
  : o2f method for survdiff (survival difference tests)

- [`o2f(`*`<survfit>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.survfit.md)
  : o2f method for survfit (survival curves)

- [`o2f(`*`<survreg>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.survreg.md)
  : o2f method for survreg (parametric survival models)

- [`o2f(`*`<table>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f.table.md)
  : o2f method for table

- [`o2f_batch()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_batch.md)
  : Process multiple tables in batch

- [`o2f_batch_advanced()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_batch_advanced.md)
  : Advanced batch processing with per-table options

- [`o2f_batch_spec()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_batch_spec.md)
  : Create a batch specification

- [`o2f_bold_col()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_bold_col.md)
  : Bold specific columns

- [`o2f_cache_clear()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_cache_clear.md)
  : Clear the o2f cache

- [`o2f_cache_dir()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_cache_dir.md)
  : Get the cache directory

- [`o2f_cache_info()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_cache_info.md)
  : Get cache statistics

- [`o2f_cache_set_dir()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_cache_set_dir.md)
  : Set the cache directory

- [`o2f_coef()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_coef.md)
  : Quick coefficient table from model

- [`o2f_collapse_rows()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_collapse_rows.md)
  : Create collapse rows specification

- [`o2f_color_row()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_color_row.md)
  : Color specific rows

- [`o2f_decimal()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_decimal.md)
  : Create decimal-aligned column specification (convenience wrapper)

- [`o2f_footnote()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_footnote.md)
  : Create table footnotes

- [`o2f_format()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_format.md)
  : Create a formatting specification

- [`o2f_header_above()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_header_above.md)
  : Create spanning header specification

- [`o2f_highlight()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_highlight.md)
  : Highlight cells based on a condition

- [`o2f_include()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_include.md)
  : Include a o2f table as a LaTeX figure

- [`o2f_include_inline()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_include_inline.md)
  : Include a o2f table inline (no float)

- [`o2f_include_margin()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_include_margin.md)
  : Include a o2f table in the margin

- [`o2f_include_sidebyside()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_include_sidebyside.md)
  : Include side-by-side o2f tables

- [`o2f_include_wrap()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_include_wrap.md)
  : Include a o2f table in a wraptable environment

- [`o2f_inline()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_inline.md)
  : Inline Table for R Markdown Documents

- [`o2f_italic_col()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_italic_col.md)
  : Italicize specific columns

- [`o2f_list_themes()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_list_themes.md)
  : List available themes

- [`o2f_margin_packages()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_margin_packages.md)
  : Get required LaTeX packages for margin methods

- [`o2f_mark()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_mark.md)
  : Create footnote marker for table cells

- [`o2f_output_formats()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_output_formats.md)
  : List available output formats

- [`o2f_ref()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_ref.md)
  : Generate LaTeX for referencing a table

- [`o2f_regression()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_regression.md)
  : Create side-by-side regression comparison table

- [`o2f_rms_compare()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_rms_compare.md)
  : Create side-by-side comparison table for rms models

- [`o2f_siunitx()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_siunitx.md)
  : Create siunitx column specification for decimal alignment

- [`o2f_theme()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_theme.md)
  : Create a o2f theme

- [`o2f_theme_apa()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_theme_apa.md)
  : APA theme

- [`o2f_theme_clear()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_theme_clear.md)
  : Clear all custom themes

- [`o2f_theme_get()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_theme_get.md)
  : Get the current global o2f theme

- [`o2f_theme_lancet()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_theme_lancet.md)
  : Lancet theme

- [`o2f_theme_minimal()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_theme_minimal.md)
  : Minimal theme

- [`o2f_theme_nature()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_theme_nature.md)
  : Nature theme

- [`o2f_theme_nejm()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_theme_nejm.md)
  : NEJM theme

- [`o2f_theme_register()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_theme_register.md)
  : Register a custom theme

- [`o2f_theme_set()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_theme_set.md)
  : Set the global o2f theme

- [`o2f_theme_unregister()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_theme_unregister.md)
  : Unregister a custom theme

- [`o2f_tidy()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/o2f_tidy.md)
  : Convert any broom-supported object to a LaTeX table

- [`output-formats`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/output-formats.md)
  : Output Format Handlers

- [`print(`*`<o2f_collapse>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/print.o2f_collapse.md)
  : Print method for o2f_collapse objects

- [`print(`*`<o2f_footnote>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/print.o2f_footnote.md)
  : Print method for o2f_footnote objects

- [`print(`*`<o2f_format>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/print.o2f_format.md)
  : Print method for o2f_format objects

- [`print(`*`<o2f_header>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/print.o2f_header.md)
  : Print method for o2f_header objects

- [`print(`*`<o2f_siunitx>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/print.o2f_siunitx.md)
  : Print method for o2f_siunitx objects

- [`print(`*`<o2f_theme>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/print.o2f_theme.md)
  : Print method for o2f_theme objects

- [`print(`*`<zzo2f_batch_spec>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/print.zzo2f_batch_spec.md)
  : Print method for zzo2f_batch_spec

- [`print(`*`<zzo2f_collapse>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/print.zzo2f_collapse.md)
  : Print method for zzo2f_collapse

- [`print(`*`<zzo2f_format>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/print.zzo2f_format.md)
  : Print method for zzo2f_format

- [`print(`*`<zzo2f_siunitx>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/print.zzo2f_siunitx.md)
  : Print method for zzo2f_siunitx

- [`register_o2f_engine()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/register_o2f_engine.md)
  : Register the o2f knitr engine

- [`register_zzo2f_engine()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/register_zzo2f_engine.md)
  : Register the zzo2f knitr engine

- [`rms-methods`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/rms-methods.md)
  : RMS Package S3 Methods

- [`s3-methods`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/s3-methods.md)
  : S3 Methods for Statistical Objects

- [`sanitize_column_names()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/sanitize_column_names.md)
  : Sanitize column names to be valid in both R and LaTeX

- [`sanitize_table_cells()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/sanitize_table_cells.md)
  : Sanitize table cells to be LaTeX-safe

- [`themes`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/themes.md) :
  Theme System for zzobj2fig

- [`zzo2f-batch`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f-batch.md)
  : Batch Processing for the Typst Backend

- [`zzo2f-formatting`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f-formatting.md)
  : Cell-Level Formatting Specifications for zzo2f

- [`zzo2f-include`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f-include.md)
  : Typst Figure-Inclusion Helpers

- [`zzo2f-inline`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f-inline.md)
  : Inline Rendering and knitr Engine for the Typst Backend

- [`zzo2f-preamble`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f-preamble.md)
  : Preamble Emitters for the Typst Backend

- [`zzo2f-refs`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f-refs.md)
  : References and Notes for zzo2f Tables

- [`zzo2f-siunitx`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f-siunitx.md)
  : Numeric Alignment for the Typst Backend

- [`zzo2f-stat`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f-stat.md)
  : Statistical-Object Helpers for the Typst Backend

- [`zzo2f-structure`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f-structure.md)
  : Structural Specifications for zzo2f Tables

- [`zzo2f()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f.md) :
  Typst Backend for Table-to-Figure Conversion

- [`zzo2f(`*`<anova>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f.anova.md)
  [`zzo2f(`*`<aov>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f.anova.md)
  : zzo2f method for ANOVA objects

- [`zzo2f(`*`<default>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f.default.md)
  [`zzo2f(`*`<data.frame>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f.default.md)
  [`zzo2f(`*`<matrix>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f.default.md)
  [`zzo2f(`*`<table>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f.default.md)
  : Default method for zzo2f (data frames)

- [`zzo2f(`*`<glm>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f.glm.md)
  : zzo2f method for generalized linear models

- [`zzo2f(`*`<htest>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f.htest.md)
  : zzo2f method for hypothesis tests

- [`zzo2f(`*`<lm>`*`)`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f.lm.md)
  : zzo2f method for linear models

- [`zzo2f_batch()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f_batch.md)
  : Batch-render tables with the Typst backend

- [`zzo2f_batch_advanced()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f_batch_advanced.md)
  : Advanced batch rendering with per-table overrides

- [`zzo2f_batch_spec()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f_batch_spec.md)
  : Spec constructor for zzo2f advanced batch processing

- [`zzo2f_bold_col()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f_bold_col.md)
  : Bold specific columns (Typst backend)

- [`zzo2f_coef()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f_coef.md)
  : Coefficient table rendered inline with the Typst backend

- [`zzo2f_collapse_rows()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f_collapse_rows.md)
  : Collapse repeated values in columns (Typst backend)

- [`zzo2f_color_row()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f_color_row.md)
  : Apply background color to rows (Typst backend)

- [`zzo2f_compile()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f_compile.md)
  : Compile Typst source to an image file

- [`zzo2f_decimal()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f_decimal.md)
  : Decimal-place formatting for numeric columns (Typst backend)

- [`zzo2f_font()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f_font.md)
  :

  Font directive for Typst (parallel to
  [`fontspec()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/fontspec.md))

- [`zzo2f_footnote()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f_footnote.md)
  : Table footnotes (Typst backend)

- [`zzo2f_format()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f_format.md)
  : Create a Typst formatting specification

- [`zzo2f_header_above()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f_header_above.md)
  : Spanning column headers (Typst backend)

- [`zzo2f_highlight()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f_highlight.md)
  : Highlight cells by condition (Typst backend)

- [`zzo2f_include()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f_include.md)
  : Include a rendered table as a Typst figure

- [`zzo2f_include_inline()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f_include_inline.md)
  : Include a rendered table inline (no figure wrapper)

- [`zzo2f_include_margin()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f_include_margin.md)
  : Include a rendered table in the page margin (approximation)

- [`zzo2f_include_sidebyside()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f_include_sidebyside.md)
  : Include two rendered tables side by side

- [`zzo2f_include_wrap()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f_include_wrap.md)
  : Include a rendered table with text flowing around it (approximation)

- [`zzo2f_inline()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f_inline.md)
  : Render a table inline for R Markdown / Quarto (Typst backend)

- [`zzo2f_italic_col()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f_italic_col.md)
  : Italicize specific columns (Typst backend)

- [`zzo2f_margin_packages()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f_margin_packages.md)
  : Margin-figure preamble packages (Typst: none required)

- [`zzo2f_mark()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f_mark.md)
  : Footnote marker for Typst cell content

- [`zzo2f_page()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f_page.md)
  :

  Page directive for Typst (parallel to
  [`geometry()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/geometry.md))

- [`zzo2f_ref()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f_ref.md)
  : Cross-reference to a labeled table (Typst backend)

- [`zzo2f_regression()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f_regression.md)
  : Side-by-side regression comparison table (Typst backend)

- [`zzo2f_rms_compare()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f_rms_compare.md)
  : Side-by-side RMS regression comparison (Typst backend)

- [`zzo2f_siunitx()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f_siunitx.md)
  :

  Build a Typst `siunitx`-analog specification

- [`zzo2f_textlang()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f_textlang.md)
  :

  Language directive for Typst (parallel to
  [`babel()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/babel.md))

- [`zzo2f_tidy()`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzo2f_tidy.md)
  : Tidy a model object and render with the Typst backend

- [`zzz`](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/reference/zzz.md) : Package
  Initialization

  zzobj2fig](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/articles/advanced-features.md):

  Themes](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/articles/object-types-and-themes.md):

  pander](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/articles/pander-vs-zzobj2fig-challenges.md):

  Backend)](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/articles/quickstart_zzo2f.md):

  v0.2.1](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/articles/quickstart.md):
- [Creating LaTeX Tables and Cropped PDFs from
  Dataframes](https://rgt47.github.io/zzobj2fig/articles/zzobj2fig.md):
